ddt:Target.Name: SCU_HHN_UK33_C1AHS_v1.3
ddt:Target.Description:
[8] 2022/01/17 : Auto ident supplier update (A42)
[7] 2021/06/28 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot Request to write VIN added
[6] 2021/04/26 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot Auto-identification parameters updated for PT2
[5] 2021/01/07 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot DTC and DID lists updated Screens updated - some validations are still needed
[4] 2020/02/20 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot Correction of the auto-identification parameters
[3] 11/12/2019 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot Creation of the screens DID modification (clearer names)
[2] 2019/04/23 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added Item: WS.
[1] 2019/03/14 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified item: Failures(OBD).
[N] 2018/04/05 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Initial Creation.

Item.Text: [P06B1] Shifter internal failure (S1 to S6 all to 0 logic)
[P07E9] Shift position sensor signal open failure (S1 to S6, one or several are OoR)
[P07EA]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are <0.6V
[P07EB]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are >4.5V
[P07ED]Shifter internal failure- S1 to S6 all to 1 logic or with a non existing combination
[P07EE] Shifter signal input level comparison diagnosis abnormality flag
[P0850] Shift position sensor signal out of range (P1 and / or P2 OoR)
[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)
[P0852] Shift position sensor signal open failure (P1 and / or P2 >4.5V)
[P272A] Motor A drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
[P272C] Motor B drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[P06B1] Shifter internal failure (S1 to S6 all to 0 logic)
[P07E9] Shift position sensor signal open failure (S1 to S6, one or several are OoR)
[P07EA]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are <0.6V
[P07EB]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are >4.5V
[P07ED]Shifter internal failure- S1 to S6 all to 1 logic or with a non existing combination
[P07EE] Shifter signal input level comparison diagnosis abnormality flag
[P0850] Shift position sensor signal out of range (P1 and / or P2 OoR)
[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)
[P0852] Shift position sensor signal open failure (P1 and / or P2 >4.5V)
[P272A] Motor A drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
[P272C] Motor B drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Go back to D-pos after calibration (06h)
The time of a fail control (07h)
Turning on look learning (the time of a driven early stage) (04h)

Data.Name: Driven opening, mode frequency integrated value
Highest SCU temperature recorded
Data.Comment: Highest ECU temperature recorded since the SCU has been mounted in the car

Data.Name: Highest actuator temperature recorded
Data.Comment: Highest motor temperature recorded since the SCU has been mounted in the car

Data.Name: IGN ON counter
Data.Comment: IGN number counted since the SCU has been mounted in the car. Incremented by one at IGN OFF -> ON

Data.Name: Learning counter
Data.Comment: The number of wall learning counter

Data.Name: Target shift position counter
Data.Comment: Counter that represents the target shift position (eg: 0-30 = P, 31-50 = N, etc.)

Data.Name: SCU_GearboxPositionTarget
Data.Comment: Gearbox position target transmitted by SCU

Data.Name: Shifter position read by SCU
Data.Comment: Shifter position following driver's operation (SCU input)

Data.Name: Current shift position counter
Data.Comment: Counter that represents the current shift position (eg: 0-30 = P, 31-50 = N, etc.)

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Item.Text: Reducing agent temperatures at tank condition
Exhaust gaz temperature upstream catalyst condition
Regular pressure build up not ok

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Request.Name: DataRead.Driven opening, mode frequency integrated value

DataItem.Name: Driven opening, mode frequency integrated value

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Device.Name: [P06B1] Shifter internal failure (S1 to S6 all to 0 logic)
[P07E9] Shift position sensor signal open failure (S1 to S6, one or several are OoR)
[P0852] Shift position sensor signal open failure (P1 and / or P2 >4.5V)
[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)
[P0850] Shift position sensor signal out of range (P1 and / or P2 OoR)
[P07EE] Shifter signal input level comparison diagnosis abnormality flag
[P272A] Motor A drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
[P272C] Motor B drive circuit -Lo side diagnosis status
[P07ED]Shifter internal failure- S1 to S6 all to 1 logic or with a non existing combination
[P07EB]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are >4.5V
